title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a tiny core of read, write, edit, and bash operations, designed to be extensible via user-written or installed extensions. It supports multiple language models including alternatives to frontier models like Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, allowing users to build custom agent setups with lower costs.
